introduction: Josh Gates goes on an awe-inspiring journey to the most storied places on the planet. He immerses himself in the legends that made these intriguing locations famous and explores them through his unique point of view.[Episodes]S2 E1 Out of This WorldS2 E2 End of the WorldS2 E3 Rock and a Hard PlaceS2 E4 Truth or ConsequencesS2 E5 Slave to LoveS2 E6 What Lurks WithinS2 E7 Flesh and BloodS2 E8 About TimeS2 E9 Moment of TruthS2 E10 Can You Dig It?S2 E11 Vocation, Vocation, VocationS2 E12 Man vs NatureS2 E13 Fight or Flight[About the Host]Josh Gatesis an adventurer and avid explorer with a unique brand of humor and deep-rooted passion for off-the-map excursions. Travel Channel’sExpedition Unknownchronicles Gates’ adventures as he sets out on a global journey to find the truth behind captivating and iconic unsolved legends.
